old_value: {"id":"tns-csi-o4x","title":"Add cifs-utils to Dockerfile","description":"Add cifs-utils (and possibly samba-client) to the Alpine packages in the Dockerfile runtime stage. Without mount.cifs, SMB mounts will silently fail at runtime on node pods.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"fenio@debian.org","created_at":"2026-03-02T09:36:46Z","created_by":"Bartosz Fenski","updated_at":"2026-03-02T09:36:46Z"}

{"id":"tns-csi-dp0","title":"Add SMB API methods to TrueNAS client","description":"Add sharing.smb.create/delete/query WebSocket API methods to pkg/tnsapi/client.go and interface.go, following the pattern of existing NFS/iSCSI/NVMe-oF methods.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"fenio@debian.org","created_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:38Z","created_by":"Bartosz Fenski","updated_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:38Z"}

new_value: Added cifs-utils to Dockerfile runtime dependencies
Added SMB types, properties, interface methods, client implementations, and updated all 4 mock clients
SMB mock methods were added to all 4 mock clients as part of dp0 (interface compliance required it)

old_value: {"id":"tns-csi-28p","title":"Implement SMB controller","description":"Create controller_smb.go with SMB-specific CreateVolume, DeleteVolume, and ExpandVolume implementations, following the pattern of controller_nfs.go/controller_iscsi.go/controller_nvmeof.go.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"fenio@debian.org","created_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:38Z","created_by":"Bartosz Fenski","updated_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:38Z"}

{"id":"tns-csi-ccy","title":"Implement SMB node operations","description":"Create node_smb.go with stage/unstage/publish/unpublish operations using CIFS mounts, following the pattern of node_nfs.go/node_iscsi.go/node_nvmeof.go.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"fenio@debian.org","created_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:38Z","created_by":"Bartosz Fenski","updated_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:38Z"}

new_value: All SMB controller dispatch points implemented: createVolumeByProtocol, DeleteVolume, checkExistingVolume, IsVolumeAdoptable, checkAndAdoptVolume, expandAdoptedVolume, ControllerExpandVolume, ControllerGetVolume, getProtocolFromVolumeContext. All tests pass.

All SMB node dispatch points implemented: NodeStageVolume, NodeUnstageVolume, NodePublishVolume, NodeExpandVolume, detectProtocolFromStagingPath, detectProtocolFromVolumePath, checkVolumeHealth. All tests pass.
SMB cases added to setupVolumeFromClone, decodeCompactSnapshotID protocol validation, and discoverVolumeBySearching. All tests pass.
Implemented SMB credential handling (writeSMBCredentialsFile, isSMBKerberosAuth, stageSMBVolume credential logic) and Helm chart SMB StorageClass with nodeStageSecretRef support. All tests pass.
Implemented SMB credential handling (writeSMBCredentialsFile, isSMBKerberosAuth, stageSMBVolume credential logic) and Helm chart SMB StorageClass with nodeStageSecretRef support. All tests pass.

old_value: {"id":"tns-csi-ylw","title":"Add SMB E2E tests","description":"Create E2E test suite under tests/e2e/smb/ covering basic provisioning, expansion, snapshots, cloning, and data persistence for SMB volumes.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"fenio@debian.org","created_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:39Z","created_by":"Bartosz Fenski","updated_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:39Z"}

new_value: Implemented full SMB E2E test suite: 5 test files (basic, snapshot_restore, clone, persistence, suite bootstrap) under tests/e2e/smb/, plus framework changes (config, helm, kubernetes, framework, truenas) and Makefile target. All checks pass: go build, go test, golangci-lint.

old_value: {"id":"tns-csi-2zy","title":"Review all E2E tests for multiprotocol SMB coverage","description":"Review all E2E tests that iterate over multiple protocols (e.g., reclaim_policy_test.go, encryption tests) and ensure SMB is included in the protocol list.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"fenio@debian.org","created_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:42Z","created_by":"Bartosz Fenski","updated_at":"2026-02-28T22:22:42Z"}

new_value: Added SMB to all multiprotocol E2E tests: helm.go (all case), framework.go (secret create/cleanup), reclaim_policy_test.go, volume_expansion_test.go, pvc_metadata_test.go, encryption/shared_test.go, multi_protocol_mount_test.go. All conditional on SMB_USERNAME.
